failedAssertions.reason: With no usable OAuth bootstrap and an invalid sheet value, Save & reload reloaded to the setup surface and cleared overrides instead of keeping Settings open with a Sheet-tab validation error.
Discovery-focused entry points from Settings and the dashboard behaved like no-ops instead of opening the intended discovery setup surface.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: Blocked: real Google auth could not be established in the fresh validator session. Runtime token bridge probes returned 401 and live sign-in stopped at the Google identifier page, so write-capable post-sign-in behavior could not be demonstrated.
Blocked: session-restore behavior could not be tested because no valid signed-in session was established for the configured client ID in the fresh validator browser.
Blocked: client-ID invalidation of cached session reuse could not be proven because the validator session never reached a valid authenticated baseline to invalidate.
Blocked: fail-closed auth behavior could not be verified from a signed-in state because auth bootstrap failed before any real session existed; only pre-auth 401 probes were observed.

Blocked: the starter-sheet-created cold-start ordering proof could not be completed because the clean validator session reached Google OAuth but could not continue through the authenticated starter-sheet creation step in Exec mode.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated authenticated-browser guidance to treat the runtime token bridge as opportunistic only after fresh-session Google userinfo and Sheets probes returned 401, and documented cookie-import fallback caveat.
